Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MASTER LOCK COMPANY.
APPEARANCES: DAVID H. WILLIAMS, ESQUIRE (510.271.0826) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MICHAEL J. STEEL, ESQUIRE (PILLSBURY WINTHROP SHAW PITTMAN, 415.983.1000) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT MASTER LOCK CO.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIES THE TENTATIVE RULING AND APPROVES THE SETTLEMENT. HEARING HELD TO DISCUSS THE SCOPE OF THE RELEASE, IN PARTICULAR, WHETHER THE RELEASE WOULD BAR A THIRD PARTIES CLAIM FOR DAMAGES BASED ON EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
